title: [NoRWX] Proof-of-Concept
purpose: Delays position-independent x86-64 machine code execution read/write memory-delay без execution permissions.
description: NoRWX is a security research project exploring unconventional code execution techniques using hardware breakpoints with VEH.
features: Windows API calls from emulated code

title: [cpp-pic] Position-Independent Platform
purpose: C++23 framework for position-independent code generation across multiple platforms and architectures.
description: cpp-pic is a comprehensive C++23 framework for truly position-independent code across multiple platforms.
features: Multi-platform (Windows, Linux, UEFI) and multi-architecture (i386, x86_64, armv7a, aarch64)
TLS 1.3 with certificate verification, DNS, HTTP, WebSocket
technologies: C++23, Windows PEB/NTAPI, Linux syscalls, UEFI
audience: Security researchers, system programmers, embedded developers

title: [EC] Armenian Encoding Converter
purpose: Utility for converting Armenian text between encoding formats including ANSI, Unicode and ArmSCII.
description: EC is a specialized tool for Armenian text encoding conversion between legacy and modern formats.
